spec_match.rationale: Rewrites inset-area to position-area in CSS source — exactly the migration the deprecation requires.

interactive.rationale: Real paste-migrate-copy workflow with sample CSS loader and chip stats.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises a regex codemod with selector/at-rule/inline-style coverage; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Regex pass treats inset-area inside comments as a match (will rewrite '/* uses inset-area */' too). The `@supports (inset-area: top)` clause in the sample is a real edge case the migration must handle — re-checking how the codemod handles the parens would be reassuring.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, .chip.warn sets background + color together (rule #6 compliant).

openQuestions.title: Document the comment/string false positives
openQuestions.detail: The codemod uses a plain regex. Add a one-line note that the tool will also rewrite the literal string inset-area inside comments — visitors who paste documentation will see this happen.

openQuestions.title: Verify @supports clause handling
openQuestions.detail: The sample CSS includes `@supports (inset-area: top)`. After migration this should become `@supports (position-area: top)` — confirm the codemod handles this case (it does in the regex, but a unit test on this exact path would be reassuring).

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 2 follow-up question(s) remain.
